n: A Little More for the Road

steps.t: Chicory can be found to the south of where Oter and Stithwulf are camped, in the shade of trees. Stithwulf asked you to gather chicory for their suppl…
Oter's waggon is at his camp to the north of the chicory patches. Oter asked for any chicory you find to be placed in the crate on his waggon.
Oter is at his camp, north of the chicory patches. Oter would like to thank you for helping him bolster their supply of food and medicine before he an…
